title: Repeat best run
hypothesis: Re-running the best configuration checks whether it was a lucky draw.
kill_criterion: val_loss does not improve after one rerun

title: Paper warmup port
hypothesis: The paper-backed warmup mechanism should stabilize early optimization.
change: edit train.py to add a short warmup schedule
kill_criterion: val_loss does not improve over the current baseline noise band

title: Hypothesis warmup test
hypothesis: A warmup-specific change can be validated with a small configuration edit.
change: add a 50-step warmup in train.py and keep the rest frozen
kill_criterion: val_loss does not improve on a matched baseline-sized run

title: Attention sparsity probe
hypothesis: If attention is the bottleneck, a sparse routing tweak may help.
change: edit train.py to try a minimal attention routing change
kill_criterion: val_loss does not improve after one small attention change
